chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. B. A. No. 999 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 03.09.2025 Mr. Shabbir Ahmed Kumbhar, advocate a/w applicants Ms. Rahat Ehsan, APG ---------- Counsel for applicants submits that since grant of ad-interim pre-arrest to applicants, they are regularly attending the trial Court. He presses that he will be satisfied if this Pre-arrest Bail Application is converted into Protective Bail on the same surety as submitted earlier to this Court so as to enable him to seek bail from concerned trial Court. In view of the above, this Pre-arrest Bail Application is converted into Protective Bail and the applicants are admitted to protective bail up to 08.09.2025, to enable them to seek remedy as provided under the law before the relevant Court on the same surety as furnished by them in terms of order dated 18.04.2025. This order shall cease to have its effect on 08.09.2025 or on approaching the applicants before the relevant Court whichever is earlier. The applicants are cautioned that this concession of protective bail will not be extended for any reason whatsoever and if the applicants fail to surrender before the relevant Court during validity of this protective bail, the bail bond shall stand forfeited. The criminal bail application is disposed of in the foregoing terms. J U D G E Ashraf
